name: AssetExclusion: Exclude MAC Address By NetBIOS Name
notes: Blacklists a MAC Address that has been associated with N different NetBIOS Names over a given period of time.
conditions_text: when the event matches Has Identity is True
when any of Identity MAC are contained in any of Asset Reconciliation MAC Whitelist - AlphaNumeric (Ignore Case), Asset Reconciliation MAC Blacklist - AlphaNumeric (Ignore Case)
when at least 3 events are seen with the same Identity MAC and different Identity Net Bios Name in 2 hour(s)
thresholds: when at least 3 events are seen with the same Identity MAC and different Identity Net Bios Name in 2 hour(s)
TD_list: APPLY AssetExclusion: Exclude MAC Address By NetBIOS Name on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event matches Has Identity is True
AND NOT when any of Identity MAC are contained in any of Asset Reconciliation MAC Whitelist - AlphaNumeric (Ignore Case), Asset Reconciliation MAC Blacklist - AlphaNumeric (Ignore Case)
AND when at least 3 events are seen with the same Identity MAC and different Identity Net Bios Name in 2 hour(s)
RED_list: Add the "identityMAC" of the event or flow payload to the Reference Set "Asset Reconciliation MAC Blacklist"
